text: I miss you and I do not know how to say it without sounding angry
I feel abandoned when days go by without hearing from you
I am furious, but underneath that I am scared of losing this
Thank you for seeing me on my worst day
I love you, but I do not trust the silence
I keep replaying what I said and I hate that I hurt you
I am hopeful we can talk like adults and not enemies
I feel alone even when the room is full
I am confused by the mixed signals and I need a straight answer
I am afraid to open up because it always gets used against me
I appreciate that you apologized without making excuses
Part of me wants to forgive, but I am not there yet
I still care about you more than I want to admit
Every argument makes me think we are breaking something we cannot fix
I am proud of your progress, but I need consistency
You say you care, but I need to feel it in your actions
I wish I had spoken softer when you were already hurting
I want closeness, but I also need room to breathe
When you go cold, I start preparing for loss
I am angry because I wanted this to be safe
I do not need perfect words, I need honesty
I feel invisible when my effort goes unnoticed
The silence feels like mourning something that is not dead yet
I can see you are trying and that matters to me
I am ashamed of how defensive I become when I feel small
I want to believe we can rebuild this slowly
I regret making you carry pain I should have faced myself
I need some distance before I can hear you clearly
I still love you and that is what makes this so hard
I do not know what you want from me anymore
